title: Refine Metric Wizard — Dashboard Widgets, Merge, and Add Metrics
story: As a data analyst, I want the Metric Wizard to show dashboard widgets, suggest metrics, and let me merge similar metrics, so that I can automatically generate a refined Metrics Glossary from my Salesforce dashboards.
description:
Major refinement of the Metric Wizard (magic wand) flow based on a wireframe walkthrough. The wizard now includes:

1. Dashboard selection and processing showing selected dashboards and their associated reports (with clickable report names linking to Salesforce)
2. Dashboard widgets display extracted from the Salesforce dashboard metadata JSON
3. Suggested metrics with checkboxes for bulk selection and an 'Add' button to add selected metrics to the glossary
4. Merge functionality — users select two or more metrics and merge them into one, choosing a primary metric
5. Suggested categories section with the ability to add suggested values to the Topic taxonomy

The feature was designed with input from a graphic designer and includes report description display and minus/plus icon interactions for dashboard widgets and suggested metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Wizard step 2 shows processed dashboards and reports with clickable report names
Dashboard widgets are extracted and displayed from the metadata JSON
Suggested metrics appear with checkboxes for multi-select
Add button creates selected suggested metrics in the glossary
Merge button is enabled when two or more metrics are selected
Merge flow shows an offcanvas to select the primary metric before merging
Suggested categories section allows adding values to the Topic taxonomy
ux_changes: Full wizard UX with dashboard/report cards, widget display, suggested metrics with checkbox selection, add and merge flows, and suggested categories section.
middleware_changes: Merge service combines multiple metric records into one, retaining aliases and relationships from merged metrics. Add service creates new metrics from wizard suggestions.
api_changes: Endpoints for adding suggested metrics, merging metrics, and adding suggested category values.
implementation_notes: Dashboard widget parsing required assistance from Anton who had JSON parsing experience. Max 20 widgets per dashboard. Merge functionality marks one as primary and consolidates aliases and relationships. Built on staging for testing.
comment_summary: Extensive multi-week effort implementing the full wizard flow. Developer built dashboard/report display, widget parsing, suggested metrics with add/merge, and suggested categories. Report names made clickable. Approved as the most important product feature.
